prompt: Customize the CardTopLeft Remotion component by setting the name, title, bottom highlight line color, title text color, background color, animation stiffness, and text delay while preserving the diagonal slide-in animation from the top-left.

propsSchema.name: accentColor
propsSchema.description: CSS color for the bottom highlight line.

propsSchema.name: titleColor
propsSchema.description: CSS color for the title text.

propsSchema.name: cardBackgroundColor
propsSchema.description: CSS color for the card background block.

propsSchema.name: animationStiffness
propsSchema.description: Spring stiffness for the slide-in animation.

propsSchema.name: textDelay
propsSchema.description: Frame delay before the text fades in.
